sqlMap.select: select ml.*,CASE sm.smstype when 1 then '模板发送' when 2 then '自定义发送' end as smstype,sm.smstext from s_sendmessagelog_t ml,s_sendmessage_t sm where ml.sendmessageid=sm.id ORDER BY sendtime desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO s_sendmessagelog_t (sendmessageid,sendperson,sendtime,sendflag) VALUES ($sendmessageid$,'$sendperson$','$sendtime$',$sendflag$) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
